case_title: BRADFORD KOHLENBERG VS. MONICA C. COOK

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOHLENBERG, BRADFORD AS TO DEFENDANT COOK, MONICA C. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
